tasks.subject: Task 1: getTranslatedBody lookup + bundled locale maps
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a pure, never-throwing `getTranslatedBody(version, locale, maps?)` to the changelog lib, backed by three (initially empty `{}`) bundled per-locale JSON maps.

**Files:** Create `src/i18n/changelog/{ru,ar,zh-Hans}.json` (`{}`); Modify `src/lib/changelog.ts`; Test `src/lib/changelog.test.ts`.

**Acceptance Criteria:** returns body when present, null for en/unknown/missing, never throws; normalizes locale (ru-RU->ru, zh*->zh-Hans, en*->null); three JSON files exist so build passes.

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/lib/changelog.test.ts`; `npm run build`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/i18n/changelog/ru.json", "src/i18n/changelog/ar.json", "src/i18n/changelog/zh-Hans.json", "src/lib/changelog.ts", "src/lib/changelog.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/lib/changelog.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["returns body/null/never-throws", "locale normalized", "three JSON files exist so build passes"], "planTask": 1}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Render translated body + disclaimer in WhatsNewCard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Non-English locale + translation present -> render translated body + literal #137 disclaimer linking to the version's GitHub release page; else English body + existing notice (or English, no notice).

**Files:** Modify `src/components/WhatsNewCard.tsx`, `src/i18n/locales/{en,ru,ar,zh-Hans}.json`; Create `src/components/WhatsNewCard.translated.test.tsx`.

**Acceptance Criteria:** ru+translation -> translated body + disclaimer + `/releases/tag/v<version>` link; ru+no-translation -> English + existing notice, no view-original link; en -> English no notice; parity passes with both new keys translated.

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/components/WhatsNewCard.translated.test.tsx src/components/WhatsNewCard.component.test.tsx src/i18n/locales/parity.test.ts`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/WhatsNewCard.tsx", "src/components/WhatsNewCard.translated.test.tsx", "src/i18n/locales/en.json", "src/i18n/locales/ru.json", "src/i18n/locales/ar.json", "src/i18n/locales/zh-Hans.json"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/components/WhatsNewCard.translated.test.tsx src/components/WhatsNewCard.component.test.tsx src/i18n/locales/parity.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ru+translation: body+disclaimer+release link", "ru+no-translation: English+existing notice", "en: English no notice", "parity passes"], "planTask": 2}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Release-time translation generator + tests + CI wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `scripts/translate-changelog.mjs` translates the latest released CHANGELOG entry into ru/ar/zh-Hans via Anthropic API, merging bundled JSON. Idempotent, non-blocking, DI-testable.

**Files:** Modify `package.json`/`package-lock.json`, `.github/workflows/ci.yml`; Create `scripts/translate-changelog.mjs`, `scripts/translate-changelog.test.mjs`.

**Acceptance Criteria:** parseLatestReleasedEntry returns newest non-Unreleased {version,body}; run() merges without dropping existing, idempotent unless force; no API key + no injected translateFn -> warn, no write, exit 0; node:test passes (no network/SDK import).

**Verify:** `node --test scripts/translate-changelog.test.mjs`; `node scripts/translate-changelog.mjs --help`. Step 0: invoke claude-api skill for prompt caching.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "package-lock.json", "scripts/translate-changelog.mjs", "scripts/translate-changelog.test.mjs", ".github/workflows/ci.yml"], "verifyCommand": "node --test scripts/translate-changelog.test.mjs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parseLatestReleasedEntry newest non-Unreleased", "run merges+idempotent unless force", "no key -> warn/no-write/exit0", "node:test passes no network"], "planTask": 3}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Seed v1.7.1 translations, wire release.sh, verify RTL/light
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Backfill v1.7.1 translations (live now), hook generator into release.sh for future versions, confirm card renders in light theme + RTL (Arabic).

**Files:** Modify `src/i18n/changelog/{ru,ar,zh-Hans}.json` (add real `1.7.1` body), `scripts/release.sh`.

**Acceptance Criteria:** each JSON has non-empty `1.7.1` body preserving ###Added/Fixed/Security and leaving product names/quoted labels/versions intact; release.sh runs generator + git-adds JSONs non-blocking; `npx vitest run` + `npm run build` green; manual Arabic+light RTL card with disclaimer + working `/releases/tag/v1.7.1` link.

**Verify:** `npx vitest run && npm run build`; manual screenshots via `run` skill.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/i18n/changelog/ru.json", "src/i18n/changelog/ar.json", "src/i18n/changelog/zh-Hans.json", "scripts/release.sh"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["1.7.1 body in each JSON, structure preserved", "release.sh wires generator non-blocking", "vitest + build green", "manual Arabic RTL + light verification"], "planTask": 4}
```
